dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7864 IH: Gateway Arch National Park Boundary Revision Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. Budzinski (for herself, Mr. Bost, Mr. Bell, and Mrs. Wagner) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Natural Resources

form.official-title: To amend the Act of May 17, 1954, to revise the boundary of Gateway Arch National Park.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Gateway Arch National Park Boundary Revision Act of 2026.
Section 4(a) of the Act of May 17, 1954 (16 U.S.C. 450jj–3(a); 68 Stat. 99) is amended—

paragraph.text: by striking one hundred acres and inserting 102.18 acres; and
by striking map entitled and all that follows through January 1992 and inserting map titled Gateway Arch National Park Proposed Boundary Revision, numbered 366/189,627, dated August 2023.
